name_en: Anjou Mini Limited Customization - Coral Pink
name_cn:
Anjou Mini Limited Customization - Coral Pink
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side features custom high-quality rain wash linen consistent with ZP, finished with a glossy shellac [Witty] giving a grainy texture comparable to ZP, achieving a look that is both shiny and matte 🤟. The leather is made of top-grain calfskin 👛 soft and not prickly 💪. With custom hand-painted designs, one bag offers three styles. Includes bag charm and card holder 🎀➕gift box 🎁➕upgraded manual 💌
Size: Top opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base width 10cm
🔎020660
